Calgary Roofing Company
That Cares

CALL US NOW
Calgary Roofing Company
That Cares
CALL US NOW

Roofing Services in Calgary & Surrounding Areas

RESIDENTIAL ROOFING

DON’T LET YOUR HOME BE AT RISK. KEEP YOU AND YOUR LOVED ONES SAFE WITH OUR TRUSTED RESIDENTIAL ROOFING SPECIALISTS.

COMMERCIAL ROOFING

OUR COMMERCIAL ROOFING SERVICES ARE OFFERED ALL YEAR. WE MAKE SURE ALL SAFETY AND BUILDING CODES ARE STRICTLY FOLLOWED.

FLAT
ROOFING

Prevent leaks, or worse, a collapsed roof with our consistent and reliable flat roofing services.

ROOF REPLACEMENT

WHEN IT COMES TO YOUR ROOF REPLACEMENT, WE REPAIR UNTIL WE NEED TO REPLACE. THAT IS OUR WORKMANSHIP GUARANTEED .

EXTERIORS

EXTERIORS ARE BUILT FOR YOUR PROTECTION. OUR EXTERIORS GO BEYOND THAT BY OFFERING QUALITY AESTHETIC CRAFTSMANSHIP 

The Roofing Company in Calgary You Can Trust

At City Roofing & Exteriors, we understand the importance of customer satisfaction. We put safety, quality work and on-time delivery as our top priority and always strive to innovate our skillset. As the preferred Calgary roofing company, we work hard to assist our valued customers by providing them with workmanship, service and communication that is far superior to the other roofing companies. In need of flat roofing or commercial roofing? We specialize in those fields Let us show you why we’re one of the best roofers in Calgary!

GET A QUOTE

What Separates Us From Other Calgary Roofing Companies

We understand the challenges of going through all Calgary roofing companies to select which roofers are the best choice for your roofing project. Whether it’s a roof repair or roof replacement, you want to make sure you make the right choice. Here are a few points that separate us from other Calgary roofers:

We are 100% in-house staff; we do not use ANY subcontractors.

This allows us to maintain complete control of scheduling, workmanship and clean up after your roof repairs or replacement is completed.

We don’t rent bins; we have our own dump trailers.

This not only allows us to maintain control of scheduling, but it ensures you won’t have a bin blocking your driveway for a week. We remove our dump trailer daily.

We have an office and warehouse.

90% of the Calgary roofers work out of their home! Are they real Calgary roofing companies? Or just salesmen who subcontract?

Lifetime Workmanship Warranty.

We provide all of our roof replacements with a Lifetime Workmanship Warranty.

CALL US TODAY

PROCESS WITH CITY ROOFING & EXTERIORS

QUOTE

We provide competitive quotes so you know you are getting the best price in the industry, without having to compromise quality workmanship for your exteriors.

PLAN

Our extensive planning allows for a swift and smooth operation, on schedule and without any hassle. Our details make the difference in your quality. 

INSTALL

We begin our installation by ensuring all objects are out of the way or covered. We begin our work promptly on schedule and complete our installation on-time.

CLEAN

Cleaning is done right after any work is complete. The drop-sheets and coverings protect your area and allow for quick and spotless clean. We leave nothing behind.

INSPECT

Quality guarantee is what we pride ourselves on. A full inspection is administered by a site manager and client approval is what completes the project.

As a homeowner, it can be challenging to determine if your roof needs a roof replacement or repairs. Have the expert roof inspectors at City Roofing & Exteriors conduct a free roof inspection for you. We will provide you with an honest assessment and offer the recommended action to take. The best part is, the inspection is free!

GET A QUOTE

Repair Or Replace Your Calgary Roof?

TESTIMONIALS

Highly recommend this company to anyone looking to get their roof replaced. Incredible prices and workmanship. Entire job was done in only about 8 hours. Cody was a pleasure to be in communication with, he is knowledgeable and extremely friendly. He even made time for me to come by his office and choose a shingle colour in person because I could not decide on one from the pictures. I am extremely pleased with the service I received.
Sarim T.
A friend recommended City Roofing to fix some bad leaks on my flat roof. Ken and Codi came out to have a look and later that day Ken explained to me where the problem areas are (texted me pictures as well) and the cost to fix. Ken was in constant contact, replying to my texts after hours and on weekends. What great service!! (And very reasonable price) We had lots of rain since then, no leaks! Highly recommend these guys!!
Chris L.
Highly Recommended. We had had a minor roof problem since we moved into our house 10 years ago. Our builder said it was not a roof problem and told us instead how we could maintain our house better. Fast forward 10 years later, even though we had followed the builder's instructions, the problem had deteriorated, and there were water leaks and molds. Upon a friend's recommendation, we contacted City Roofing for help.
Cody came to our home, analyzed the problem and answer all the questions I had. He and another roofer came again later in the week with all the parts and tools and fixed our roof. They did other repairs for us that were outside of scope. We are very grateful for their help. Highly recommended.
Read More
Albert L.

The Calgary Roofing Company You Can Rely On

We always want to make sure our customers are satisfied with the service we provide. Here are several reasons why we’re the Calgary roofing company you can count on:
A+ rating on the BBB
WCB Coverage
$2,000,000 Liability Insurance
COR Certification
HAAG Certified Inspectors
Full-Time Safety Officer
Certified Installer for Most Shingle Companies
Preferred Contractor for Insurance Companies
Lifetime Workmanship Warranty
Licensed and Bonded
